newsletter.title: Miss nothing.
newsletter.description: Receive the best stories every Friday directly in your inbox.
newsletter.success: Thank you! You'll receive our newsletter soon.

footer.description: A magazine for stories that matter.

about.headline: We tell stories that matter.
about.description: The Bleariness is an independent magazine for people who want more than news.
about.missionText1: The Bleariness was founded with the belief that good journalism takes time.
about.missionText2: We cover society, culture, business, sports, travel and politics.
about.missionText3: We are independent. No story we publish is the result of commercial pressure.
about.value1Text: We publish when a piece is ready – not when the news cycle demands it.
about.value2Text: We take positions and reconsider when better arguments emerge.
about.value3Text: Our editorial team reflects the society we write about.
about.bio1: Radouane El Mhamedi is the founder and editor-in-chief of The Bleariness. With a background in investigative journalism, he shapes the editorial vision of the magazine.
about.bio2: Anass El Mhamedi writes about society, art and contemporary culture. His texts combine analytical depth with clear, accessible language.
about.bio4: El Mehdi Naor is an author and storyteller. His contributions shed light on politics, travel and human life with a unique perspective.

contact.headline: Write to us.
contact.description: Questions, feedback, suggestions or cooperation requests.
contact.successText: Your message has been sent. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.natureText: The Bleariness is a non-commercial, private online magazine. It is operated without profit and is funded entirely from personal resources.
impressum.disclaimerText: The content of this magazine has been created with great care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content. We are responsible for our own content. We assume no liability for external links.
impressum.copyrightText: The content and works on this website are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution or any other use outside the limits of copyright law requires the written consent of the respective author.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.dataCollectedText: When visiting this website, the following data is automatically recorded:
datenschutz.dataItem1: IP address (anonymised by the hosting provider)
datenschutz.dataItem3: Email address, if you subscribe to our newsletter or contact us
datenschutz.purposeText: The data collected is used exclusively for the operation of the website, to respond to enquiries and to send the newsletter. Data is not shared with third parties.
datenschutz.newsletterText: If you subscribe to our newsletter, we store your email address solely for the purpose of sending it. You can unsubscribe at any time via the link in every newsletter email.
datenschutz.hostingText: This website is operated via an external hosting provider. Server log processing takes place on their servers. Please refer to the hosting provider's privacy policy for further information.
datenschutz.cookiesText: This website does not use tracking or marketing cookies. Only technically necessary cookies required for the operation of the website are used.
datenschutz.rightsIntro: You have the right at any time to:
datenschutz.rightsContact: For all requests, please contact us at:
datenschutz.changesText: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy as needed. The current version is always available on this page.

category.noArticles: No articles available in this category yet.
